serving_status.note: This file lives at site/.well-known/sab-standing.json in the repository and is NOT served by any configured server today. The FastAPI app serves only an explicit whitelist of site/ files (agora/app.py:1204-1246), the Dockerfile copies only agora/ (Dockerfile:16), and the sample nginx config denies dot-paths (deploy/sab-agora.nginx.conf 'location ~ /\.'). Serving this descriptor at /.well-known/sab-standing.json is PLANNED and requires an app route or nginx exception.

independence_status_vocabulary.note: The independence library has zero callers in agora/ (agora/sab_identity.py:491). The local verifier grades conservatively and never emits cross_operator_* grades.

status.maps_to: sab_standing_leases_v1.status, mapped to profile vocabulary by scripts/sab_verify.py

revocation_uri.maps_to: derived from live route POST /api/v1/standing/{standing_id}/revoke; lease stores revoker identity, not a URI

witness_quorum.maps_to: lease schema field, NOT enforced by the live API

independence_status.maps_to: verifier-computed only; not stored, not enforced

standing_uri.maps_to: local route GET /api/v1/standing/{standing_id} only; no public production URL is claimed

known_records.note: seeded via live API 2026-07-05; challenge window closes 2026-07-19
